guessTheTerm.selectLecture: Select a lecture to start the game.
guessTheTerm.instructions:
Instructions:
The goal of the game is to accurately guess the term chosen by the system.
A list of terms will be displayed on the screen. The system selects a term that is not revealed to you.
Keep asking yes-or-no questions to narrow down and eliminate terms from the list.
When you're ready, click 'Select answer' to submit your guess.
The number of attempts for asking questions and making guesses is limited.
guessTheTerm.chatHint: Ask yes-or-no questions in chat to guess the secret term
guessTheTerm.questionsUsed: You have used {used} out of {total} questions.
guessTheTerm.successFound: You found the answer in {count} questions.
guessTheTerm.successWrong: You made {count} wrong guesses. Try again for a perfect score!

running.subtitle: A side-scrolling runner — jump obstacles and answer quizzes
running.goal: Your character runs automatically. Jump over obstacles and answer quizzes that appear periodically. Survive as long as you can!

deck.subtitle: Flashcards with spaced repetition for effective memorization
deck.goal: See a keyword on the front of the card. Try to recall its meaning, then flip to check. Rate how well you knew it.

cardMatch.subtitle: Matching game pairing keywords with descriptions
cardMatch.goal: Keyword and description cards are displayed in a grid. Select two cards at a time to find matching keyword-description pairs.
cardMatch.previewHint: Select two cards at a time to find pairs

definitionBuilder.subtitle: Fill in the blanks with correct tokens to complete definitions
definitionBuilder.goal: Given a keyword, its definition has missing tokens. Select the correct tokens from the choices below to complete it.
definitionBuilder.controlSelect: Click a choice to auto-fill the blank
definitionBuilder.previewHint: Select the correct token from the choices

guessTheTerm.subtitle: Deduce the AI's secret term by asking yes/no questions
guessTheTerm.goal: The AI picks a secret term from your word list. You have up to 5 questions and 4 guess attempts. Narrow it down with questions, then pick the answer.
guessTheTerm.previewHint: Ask questions to deduce the secret term

loginModal.resetPasswordGuide:
Forgot your password?
Please contact us at the email below and we will help you reset your password.

Please include your registered email and full name in your inquiry.
loginModal.verifyStepSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email and set a new password.
loginModal.passwordRequirements: Include at least 3 of: uppercase, lowercase, numbers, special characters (8-128 chars)
loginModal.successMessage: Your password has been changed successfully. Please log in with your new password.
loginModal.noAccountSignup: Don't have an account? Sign up

passwordChange.title: Change Password
passwordChange.description: Click the button below to change your password.
passwordChange.formDescription: Please enter your current password. A verification code will be sent to your registered email.
passwordChange.passwordRequirements: Include at least 3 of: uppercase, lowercase, numbers, special characters (8-128 chars)
passwordChange.verifiedMessage: Verification complete. Please set your new password.
passwordChange.successDescription: Please log in again with your new password.

aiTutor: AI professor is deep in thought... 🤔

signup.title: Create New Account
signup.checkSpam: If you don't receive the email, please check your spam folder.
signup.signupCompleteMessage: Welcome to CLASSDUO. You can now access all features.
signup.adminApprovalMessage: Your registration approval request has been sent to the administrator. Once approved, you can log in with your email and password. This may take up to 12 hours.
signup.adminApprovalEmailGuide: For faster identity verification, please send a registration approval request email to the admin address below from your school email ({email}).

signupModal.title: Sign up
signupModal.subtitle: Enter your information
signupModal.adminApprovalMessage: Your registration approval request has been sent to the administrator. Once approved, you can log in with your email and password. This may take up to 12 hours.
signupModal.adminApprovalEmailGuide: For faster identity verification, please send a registration approval request email to the admin address below from your school email ({email}).

guard.loginNoticeLine2: A separate sign-up is required. Please use your @korea.ac.kr email — the same one linked to the Korea University portal!
guard.noticeLine1: If you don't receive the verification email, click the signup button and then press the 'Request admin approval for registration' button that appears.
guard.noticeLine2: We process all approval requests within 12 hours. After that, you can log in with the email and password you registered with.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.nameMax: Name must be 50 characters or less
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

emailNotice.title: Not receiving the verification email?
emailNotice.workspaceDesc: For @korea.ac.kr email, after creating your account on the university portal, you must separately activate your Google Workspace account to receive emails. Without activation, all incoming emails including verification emails will bounce.
emailNotice.approvalDesc: All students who sent admin approval requests have been approved. However, if your Google Workspace is not activated, the approval notification email cannot reach you.
emailNotice.loginGuide: We process all approval requests within 12 hours. Even if you haven't received a notification, you can log in with the email and password you registered with.

approvalPopup.message: Your registration approval request will be processed within 12 hours. You may not receive a confirmation email, so please try logging in with your registered email and password after 12 hours.

typeDescription.DEF_TO_TERM: Choose the term that matches the given definition or description (5 multiple choice). e.g. "Select the term that best fits the following description."
typeDescription.TERM_TO_DEF: Choose the correct definition or description for the given term (5 multiple choice). e.g. "Select the description that best matches the following term."
typeDescription.MISCONCEPTION: Choose the one incorrect statement among five options. Designed to reveal common misconceptions or wrong interpretations.
typeDescription.STRUCTURE_OBJ: 5-option multiple-choice questions about relationships between concepts (why, how, or what is the relationship). Tests comprehension of structure, not just recall.

create.settingDescription: Choose customized quiz options to boost your study efficiency.
create.aiNote: Press generate and AI will prepare customized questions.
